calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Jan-29-2004 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name of a minor.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Rhonda Fung.
Petitioners:Jing Bo Zju and Chan Ge Chen present in pro per for the minor and with Cantonese Interpreter William Guan.
Parties were sworn and examined.
The Court grants the petition for change of the MINOR'S name to : Shirley Fei Zhu.
Decree signed in open court.
